title: 12 to >0 pts
content:
12 to >0 pts
Beginning
Grammatical, spelling & punctuation errors significantly detract from meaning of paper (4+ errors per page avg.). Fails to exhibit basic knowledge of APA style; no reference entry or in-text citations.
20 pts
Total Points: 100


Week 6 | Final Exam

Final Exam
Instructions
Due by the end of class.

Select the "Take the Quiz" button to complete this 50-question exam that covers the assigned sections in in your Introduction to Writing text.

Chapter 1.1, and 1.3
Chapter 2.1, and 2.2
Chapter 3.1, 3.3, 3.7, and 3.9
Chapter 4.1 through 4.4
Chapter 5.1 through 5.4
Chapter 7.1, 7.4, and 7.5
Chapter 8.1 and 8.2
Chapter 9.1 through 9.3
Chapter 10.2
Chapter 12.1
Chapter 13.1 through 13.5
Please do not attempt the final exam before completing the weekly readings, lectures, and assignments. You will have ONE attempt for the exam. The exam is timed. You are allotted 2 minutes per question. Questions are randomized, and you will see one question at a time.
